title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content: The IDBI Bank Prepaid Card offers convenient and a secured alternative over cash for all your spends. With our prepaid card offering, you have a choice to select to suit your needs - as a gift, for salary disbursements or reimbursements and foreign travel

metadata.description: Prepaid cards from IDBI Bank are a safe & convenient way for payment. You have a choice to select your needs - as a gift, for salary disbursements or reimbursements.
